summary.en: Dill helps construction suppliers automate accounts receivable, online payments, and credit applications.
summary.zh: Dill 協助建材供應商自動化應收帳款、線上付款與信用申請流程。

highlight.en: Dill targets the construction supply niche, replacing manual finance work for receivables, payments, and credit applications with automation.
highlight.zh: Dill 鎖定建材供應商利基市場,以自動化取代應收帳款、付款與信用申請的人工財務作業。

summary.en: Automat is AI-enabled robotic process automation built with large language models and computer vision.
summary.zh: Automat 是結合大型語言模型與電腦視覺打造的 AI 機器人流程自動化。

highlight.en: Automat lets operations teams build RPA from videos and natural language, claiming 10x faster setup at a tenth of the cost of traditional tools.
highlight.zh: Automat 讓營運團隊用影片與自然語言建立 RPA,號稱建置快 10 倍、成本僅傳統工具的十分之一。

summary.en: Campfire is an AI-native ERP and accounting platform for fast-growing startups and mid-size tech companies.
summary.zh: Campfire 是專為快速成長新創與中型科技公司打造的 AI 原生 ERP 與會計平台。

highlight.en: Campfire's general ledger adds multi-entity support and advanced reporting like P&L by department and contribution margin by customer.
highlight.zh: Campfire 的總帳支援多實體與進階報表,如部門損益與客戶貢獻毛利,以加速每月結帳。

summary.en: Lio builds a multi-agent AI procurement workforce for enterprise companies worldwide.
summary.zh: Lio 為全球企業打造多代理人 AI 採購團隊。

highlight.en: Lio runs each purchase request through specialized agents working in parallel to research vendors, negotiate terms, manage approvals, and track deliveries.
highlight.zh: Lio 讓每筆採購請求由平行運作的專責代理人處理,負責研究供應商、協商條件、管理審批與追蹤交貨。

summary.en: HappyRobot is an AI-native operating system that automates supply chain and industrial-scale operations.
summary.zh: HappyRobot 是自動化供應鏈與工業級營運的 AI 原生作業系統。

highlight.en: HappyRobot combines real-time data, specialized AI workers, and orchestrating intelligence to run mission-critical operations autonomously.
highlight.zh: HappyRobot 結合即時資料、專責 AI 員工與協調式智慧,自主執行關鍵任務型營運。

summary.en: HockeyStack is an analytics platform that tracks and connects every B2B customer touchpoint to revenue.
summary.zh: HockeyStack 是追蹤並連結每個 B2B 客戶接觸點與營收的分析平台。

highlight.en: HockeyStack maps every touchpoint from ad impression to closed-won and upsell, surfacing where to deploy budget and which accounts to prioritize.
highlight.zh: HockeyStack 串連從廣告曝光到成交與加購的每個接觸點,提供預算配置與優先客戶等洞察。

summary.en: Bland AI is an enterprise platform for AI-powered phone calls.
summary.zh: Bland AI 是企業級的 AI 電話通話平台。

highlight.en: Bland AI focuses on enterprise-grade automation of phone conversations, giving large organizations a platform to handle calls with AI agents.
highlight.zh: Bland AI 專注於企業級電話通話自動化,讓大型組織能以 AI 代理人處理通話。

summary.en: Craftwork is a software-driven, full-service home painting company.
summary.zh: Craftwork 是以軟體驅動的全方位住宅油漆公司。

highlight.en: Craftwork operates as a digital-native home painting franchise, using software to improve the experience for both homeowners and operators.
highlight.zh: Craftwork 以數位原生的住宅油漆加盟模式營運,運用軟體同時提升屋主與營運者的體驗。

summary.en: Sendblue gives businesses virtual iMessage lines to text prospects and nurture sales leads.
summary.zh: Sendblue 為企業提供虛擬 iMessage 門號,用來簡訊聯繫潛在客戶與培養銷售名單。

highlight.en: Sendblue brings iMessage to sales outreach, with users reporting a 70% average increase in response rate compared to other channels.
highlight.zh: Sendblue 將 iMessage 帶入銷售開發,使用者回報回覆率平均提升 70%。

summary.en: Langdock is an all-in-one, secure platform for deploying AI across a company.
summary.zh: Langdock 是企業導入 AI 的一站式安全平台。

highlight.en: Langdock spans a chat interface for all employees plus tools to build custom AI-driven agent workflows, with security as a core focus.
highlight.zh: Langdock 涵蓋全體員工的聊天介面,以及打造客製化 AI 代理人工作流程的工具,並以安全性為核心。

summary.en: Solve Intelligence is an AI platform supporting legal teams across the entire patent process.
summary.zh: Solve Intelligence 是協助法律團隊處理整個專利流程的 AI 平台。

highlight.en: Solve covers patent drafting, office actions, infringement analysis, FTO, and litigation, and is sold to 700+ IP firms and in-house teams.
highlight.zh: Solve 涵蓋專利撰寫、官方意見回覆、侵權分析、自由實施與訴訟,已銷售給逾 700 家智財事務所與內部團隊。

summary.en: AgentCollect uses AI agents to recover aged B2B debt under the client's own brand.
summary.zh: AgentCollect 運用 AI 代理人以客戶自有品牌追回逾期 B2B 帳款。

highlight.en: AgentCollect's agents call, text, find contacts, and negotiate payment plans 24/7, recovering ~49% of debt in 20 days versus ~20% in months.
highlight.zh: AgentCollect 的代理人全天候撥電話、傳簡訊、找聯絡人並協商還款方案,20 天內追回約 49% 帳款,遠勝傳統機構數月約 20%。

summary.en: Casca is an AI-native platform that helps banks and lenders originate small business loans.
summary.zh: Casca 是協助銀行與放款機構承作中小企業貸款的 AI 原生平台。

highlight.en: Casca aims to let banks originate 10x more loans with 90% less manual effort, opening affordable funding to the 30M+ US small businesses.
highlight.zh: Casca 目標讓銀行以少 90% 人工承作多 10 倍貸款,為逾 3,000 萬家美國中小企業開啟平價融資。

summary.en: Capi Money helps businesses in emerging markets make international payments.
summary.zh: Capi Money 協助新興市場的企業進行國際付款。

highlight.en: Capi targets emerging-market importers who pay up to 10% to settle invoices and wait weeks, aiming to match US and European price and speed.
highlight.zh: Capi 鎖定新興市場進口商,他們結清發票需付高達 10% 費用且等待數週,目標提供與歐美相當的價格與速度。

summary.en: Healthtech 1 builds clinical AI that navigates patients to the right care setting the first time.
summary.zh: Healthtech 1 打造臨床 AI,協助病患一次就被導引到正確的就醫管道。

highlight.en: Healthtech 1 automates eligibility checks, triage, and appointment booking for 1,600+ NHS GP practices, aiming to make every appointment bookable.
highlight.zh: Healthtech 1 為逾 1,600 家 NHS 家醫診所自動化資格審核、檢傷分類與預約,目標讓每個就醫預約都能即時完成。

summary.en: Bretton AI is an AI agent platform for compliance work in financial services.
summary.zh: Bretton AI 是用於金融服務法遵作業的 AI 代理人平台。

highlight.en: Formerly Greenlite, Bretton AI automates sanction reviews and AML investigations for regulated banks and fintechs overseen by the OCC and SEC.
highlight.zh: 前身為 Greenlite 的 Bretton AI,為受 OCC、SEC 等監理的銀行與金融科技公司自動化制裁審查與反洗錢調查。

summary.en: Hyperbound is an enterprise revenue activation platform that turns sales call insights into action.
summary.zh: Hyperbound 是將銷售通話洞察轉化為行動的企業營收激活平台。

highlight.en: Hyperbound analyzes thousands of sales calls to find winning behaviors, then turns them into customizable AI-buyer roleplays for IBM and Bloomberg.
highlight.zh: Hyperbound 分析數千通銷售電話找出致勝行為,轉化為可客製的 AI 買家角色扮演,客戶包括 IBM 與 Bloomberg。

summary.en: Outset runs AI-powered user interviews to conduct qualitative research at scale.
summary.zh: Outset 以 AI 驅動的使用者訪談大規模進行質性研究。

highlight.en: Outset uses LLMs to lead interviews and synthesize results, giving researchers high-quality qualitative data far faster than live interviews.
highlight.zh: Outset 運用 LLM 主導訪談並彙整結果,讓研究人員取得高品質質性資料的速度遠快於真人訪談。

summary.en: VectorShift is an AI operating system for private market investors.
summary.zh: VectorShift 是專為私募市場投資人打造的 AI 作業系統。

highlight.en: VectorShift captures a firm's institutional knowledge and applies it to data room analysis, IC memos, portfolio monitoring, and LP reporting.
highlight.zh: VectorShift 蒐集投資機構的知識,並應用於資料室分析、投委會備忘錄、投資組合監控與 LP 報告。

summary.en: Trayd is a construction payroll and back-office platform built for same-day pay.
summary.zh: Trayd 是專為當日發薪打造的營建薪資與後台管理平台。

highlight.en: Trayd lets US construction workers access earned wages 7-10 days sooner than legacy providers, targeting subcontractor efficiency and labor shortage.
highlight.zh: Trayd 讓美國營建工人比傳統薪資商提早 7 至 10 天領到已賺工資,瞄準分包商效率與勞力短缺問題。

summary.en: Giga is an AI support agent for enterprises.
summary.zh: Giga 是面向企業的 AI 客服代理人。

highlight.en: Giga focuses on enterprise customer support, deploying AI agents to handle support interactions at scale for large organizations.
highlight.zh: Giga 專注於企業客戶支援,為大型組織部署 AI 代理人以規模化處理客服互動。

summary.en: Cercli is an AI-native platform for hiring and managing a workforce.
summary.zh: Cercli 是用於招募與管理人力的 AI 原生平台。

highlight.en: Cercli brings AI to HR and recruitment, giving people teams a single native platform to hire and manage their workforce.
highlight.zh: Cercli 將 AI 帶入人資與招募,為人事團隊提供單一原生平台來招募與管理人力。

summary.en: Eden Care is building the claims infrastructure for African health insurance.
summary.zh: Eden Care 正在打造非洲健康保險的理賠基礎設施。

highlight.en: Eden Care focuses specifically on the claims layer for African health insurers, building the underlying infrastructure for the region's market.
highlight.zh: Eden Care 專注於非洲健康保險公司的理賠環節,為當地市場打造底層基礎設施。

summary.en: VetRec is an AI scribe that automates clinical note-taking for veterinarians.
summary.zh: VetRec 是為獸醫自動撰寫臨床病歷的 AI 抄寫工具。

highlight.en: VetRec generates clinical notes in seconds so vets only review rather than write them, keeping focus on the pet during a visit.
highlight.zh: VetRec 數秒內產出臨床病歷,讓獸醫只需審閱而非撰寫,使看診時能專注於寵物本身。

summary.en: HyLight builds and operates autonomous hydrogen airships for long-range infrastructure monitoring.
summary.zh: HyLight 打造並營運自主氫能飛艇,用於長距離基礎設施監測。

highlight.en: HyLight's hydrogen HyLighter flies up to 10 hours over 220 miles, detecting methane leaks on pipelines and defects on power lines without emissions.
highlight.zh: HyLight 的氫動力 HyLighter 可飛行達 10 小時、航程 220 英里,偵測管線甲烷洩漏與電線缺陷且零排放。

summary.en: kapa.ai helps technical companies build AI support and onboarding bots from their existing content.
summary.zh: kapa.ai 協助技術型公司用既有內容打造 AI 支援與上手導引機器人。

highlight.en: kapa.ai turns docs, tutorials, and GitHub issues into bots that answer developer questions; used by 150+ companies including OpenAI and Docker.
highlight.zh: kapa.ai 將文件、教學與 GitHub issue 轉為能回答開發者問題的機器人,逾 150 家公司採用,包括 OpenAI 與 Docker。

summary.en: Elyos AI is an autonomous AI customer service agent built for trades and field services businesses.
summary.zh: Elyos AI 是專為技術工種與外勤服務業打造的自主 AI 客服代理人。

highlight.en: Elyos AI focuses on the trades and field services niche, offering a fully autonomous agent tailored to those businesses' customer service needs.
highlight.zh: Elyos AI 鎖定技術工種與外勤服務利基市場,提供為這類業者客服需求量身打造的全自主代理人。

summary.en: Readily is an AI compliance platform for healthcare organizations.
summary.zh: Readily 是面向醫療機構的 AI 法遵平台。

highlight.en: Readily automates regulatory analysis, policy drafting, and audit work to cut compliance effort by up to 90%, freeing staff to focus on patient care.
highlight.zh: Readily 自動化法規分析、政策草擬與稽核作業,最高減少 90% 法遵工作,讓人員專注於病患照護。

summary.en: FleetWorks is an AI-enabled marketplace that matches trucks with freight jobs.
summary.zh: FleetWorks 是以 AI 撮合卡車與貨運工作的市集平台。

highlight.en: FleetWorks targets the slow, manual $1 trillion freight market, using AI agents to replace endless calls and emails and match jobs to trucks instantly.
highlight.zh: FleetWorks 瞄準緩慢人工的兆元貨運市場,以 AI 代理人取代無止盡的電話與郵件,即時撮合工作與卡車。

summary.en: Accend provides AI agents that help banks and fintechs underwrite commercial customers faster.
summary.zh: Accend 提供 AI 代理人,協助銀行與金融科技公司更快承作商業客戶授信。

highlight.en: Accend automates document intake, financial spreading, cash flow modeling, and credit memos; Brex and Rippling cut processing time by 80%.
highlight.zh: Accend 自動化文件接收、財報歸納、現金流建模與信用備忘錄,Brex 與 Rippling 將處理時間縮短 80%。

summary.en: Electric Air is a tech-enabled heat pump installation contractor that cuts costs by 60%.
summary.zh: Electric Air 是以技術驅動的熱泵安裝承包商,可降低 60% 成本。

highlight.en: Electric Air uses technology to make heat pump installs 60% cheaper, going after a $53B annual market for efficiently heating American homes.
highlight.zh: Electric Air 運用技術讓熱泵安裝成本降低 60%,搶攻年市場規模 530 億美元的美國住宅高效暖房領域。

summary.en: Numen is working to engineer a future without cancer deaths.
summary.zh: Numen 致力於打造一個沒有癌症死亡的未來。

highlight.en: Numen pursues an ambitious mission in oncology, aiming to engineer a future in which cancer no longer causes deaths.
highlight.zh: Numen 在腫瘤領域追求宏大使命,目標打造癌症不再奪命的未來。

summary.en: Flint is an AI-powered personalized learning platform for K-12 schools.
summary.zh: Flint 是面向 K-12 學校的 AI 個人化學習平台。

highlight.en: Flint gives students a 24/7 AI tutor that adapts without giving away answers and gives teachers progress analytics, used by 500,000+ users.
highlight.zh: Flint 為學生提供全天候、會引導而不直接給答案的 AI 家教,並給教師進度分析,已有逾 50 萬名使用者。

summary.en: Tiptap is an open-source document editor and collaboration toolkit for humans and AI agents.
summary.zh: Tiptap 是供人類與 AI 代理人使用的開源文件編輯器與協作工具組。

highlight.en: Tiptap offers content editing and real-time collaboration tools for building Notion- or Google Docs-like apps, used by LinkedIn, GitLab, and Anthropic.
highlight.zh: Tiptap 提供內容編輯與即時協作工具,用於打造類似 Notion 或 Google Docs 的應用,使用者包括 LinkedIn、GitLab 與 Anthropic。

summary.en: Strada deploys AI agents that run insurance operations end-to-end.
summary.zh: Strada 部署 AI 代理人,端到端執行保險營運作業。

highlight.en: Strada's agents handle policy servicing and claims operations with native integrations into core policy, claims, and agency management systems.
highlight.zh: Strada 的代理人處理保單服務與理賠作業,原生整合核心保單、理賠與代理人管理系統。

summary.en: Artie is software that streams data from databases to data warehouses in real time.
summary.zh: Artie 是將資料從資料庫即時串流至資料倉儲的軟體。

highlight.en: Artie replaces the common pattern of running ETL every few hours or overnight, keeping the data warehouse continuously updated with live data.
highlight.zh: Artie 取代每隔數小時或隔夜跑一次 ETL 的常見做法,讓資料倉儲持續同步最新的正式環境資料。

summary.en: Decoda Health is an all-in-one EMR and practice management platform for med spas and elective care.
summary.zh: Decoda Health 是專為醫美與選擇性醫療打造的一體化電子病歷與診所管理平台。

highlight.en: Decoda consolidates 5-10 disconnected tools into one AI platform with front desk, ambient scribing, and follow-ups, live in 150+ clinics.
highlight.zh: Decoda 將 5 到 10 個分散工具整合為單一 AI 平台,含前台、環境抄寫與後續追蹤,已導入逾 150 家診所。

summary.en: Maintouch is a platform that drives leads by ranking sites on both SEO and AI search.
summary.zh: Maintouch 是同時在 SEO 與 AI 搜尋中提升排名以帶來名單的平台。

highlight.en: Maintouch positions itself as the only platform to rank on both SEO and AI search (AEO/GEO), built on automation honed at a family SEO agency.
highlight.zh: Maintouch 自詡為唯一同時能在 SEO 與 AI 搜尋(AEO/GEO)取得排名的平台,其自動化能力源自家族 SEO 公司。

summary.en: Fortuna Health is a TurboTax-style platform that helps consumers navigate Medicaid end-to-end.
summary.zh: Fortuna Health 是類似 TurboTax 的平台,協助消費者端到端處理 Medicaid 流程。

highlight.en: Fortuna guides consumers from Medicaid eligibility and enrollment through renewal, positioning as the middleware layer for the $800B Medicaid ecosystem.
highlight.zh: Fortuna 引導消費者從 Medicaid 資格、投保到續保,定位為 8,000 億美元 Medicaid 生態系的中介層。

summary.en: SyntheticFi offers low-cost securities-backed lending for financial advisors and high-net-worth clients.
summary.zh: SyntheticFi 為財務顧問與高淨值客戶提供低成本的證券抵押借貸。

highlight.en: SyntheticFi gives independent RIAs a low-cost, low-hassle way to meet their clients' liquidity needs through securities-backed lending.
highlight.zh: SyntheticFi 讓獨立財務顧問(RIA)以低成本、低麻煩的方式,透過證券抵押借貸滿足客戶的流動性需求。

summary.en: Dili builds AI automation for compliance and diligence in real-world physical industries.
summary.zh: Dili 為實體產業打造合規與盡職調查的 AI 自動化。

highlight.en: Across energy, infrastructure, datacenters, and construction, Dili runs labor compliance, helping customers secure over $1 billion in federal funding.
highlight.zh: Dili 橫跨能源、基礎設施、資料中心與營建,執行勞動法遵,協助客戶取得逾 10 億美元聯邦補助。

summary.en: CheqUPI is India's first UPI payments wallet for foreign nationals and NRIs visiting India.
summary.zh: CheqUPI 是印度首個為外籍人士與印度僑民打造的 UPI 支付錢包。

highlight.en: Cheq lets tourists and NRIs pay digitally at 55M+ Indian merchants, helping them avoid ATMs and minimize foreign exchange costs while in India.
highlight.zh: Cheq 讓觀光客與印度僑民在逾 5,500 萬家印度商家數位支付,在印度期間免用提款機並降低外匯成本。

summary.en: Bolto is an AI-powered all-in-one platform for payroll, HR, and recruiting.
summary.zh: Bolto 是 AI 驅動的薪資、人資與招募一體化平台。

highlight.en: Bolto helps companies find and hire pre-vetted global software talent, then simplifies onboarding, payroll, and compliance on one platform.
highlight.zh: Bolto 協助企業尋找並聘用經預先審核的全球軟體人才,並在單一平台上簡化入職、薪資與法遵。

summary.en: Terminal is a Plaid-like universal API for telematics data in commercial trucking.
summary.zh: Terminal 是商用卡車車聯網資料的通用 API,定位類似 Plaid。

highlight.en: Terminal's Universal API gives insurance, fintech, and fleet software builders access to GPS, speeding, and vehicle stats from trucking telematics.
highlight.zh: Terminal 的通用 API 讓保險、金融科技與車隊軟體開發者存取卡車車聯網的 GPS、超速與車輛數據。

summary.en: AIVideo.com offers superhuman video production as a service.
summary.zh: AIVideo.com 提供超人級的影片製作服務。

highlight.en: AIVideo.com delivers video production as a managed service, positioning its output as superhuman in quality and capability.
highlight.zh: AIVideo.com 以託管服務形式提供影片製作,將其成果定位為超越人類的品質與能力。

summary.en: Every combines banking, payroll, benefits, bookkeeping, and tax into one back-office platform.
summary.zh: Every 將銀行、薪資、福利、記帳與稅務整合為單一後台平台。

highlight.en: Every lets startups run their whole back office in one place: bank accounts and cards, treasury, US and international payroll, benefits, and tax.
highlight.zh: Every 讓新創在單一平台運行完整後台,涵蓋銀行帳戶與卡片、資金管理、美國與國際薪資、福利與稅務。

summary.en: Letter AI is a generative-AI revenue acceleration platform for B2B sales training, coaching, and content.
summary.zh: Letter AI 是用於 B2B 銷售培訓、教練與內容的生成式 AI 營收加速平台。

highlight.en: Letter AI builds and maintains sales collateral 10x faster, personalizes by vertical or account, and scales coaching via hyper-personalized AI roleplay.
highlight.zh: Letter AI 以 10 倍速度製作維護銷售素材,可依垂直產業或客戶客製,並以高度個人化 AI 角色扮演擴展教練培訓。

summary.en: Kobalt Labs is an AI-powered risk and compliance platform for banks and fintechs.
summary.zh: Kobalt Labs 是面向銀行與金融科技公司的 AI 風險與法遵平台。

highlight.en: Kobalt's reasoning engine ingests contracts, internal policies, and legislation to auto-surface and track risks, cutting partner diligence tenfold.
highlight.zh: Kobalt 的推理引擎彙整合約、內部政策與法規,自動找出並追蹤風險,將合作夥伴盡職調查時間縮短至十分之一。

summary.en: Inventive AI automates RFP and security questionnaire responses with AI agents.
summary.zh: Inventive AI 以 AI 代理人自動化 RFP 與資安問卷的回覆。

highlight.en: Inventive drafts responses 10x faster from a centralized hub of knowledge sources and uses an AI content manager to flag stale or conflicting content.
highlight.zh: Inventive 從集中化的知識來源中心以 10 倍速度草擬回覆,並以 AI 內容管理員標記過時或衝突的內容。

summary.en: Twenty is an open-source CRM positioned as a modern alternative to Salesforce.
summary.zh: Twenty 是開源 CRM,定位為 Salesforce 的現代替代方案。

highlight.en: Twenty builds a modern, open-source alternative to Salesforce, developed in the open on GitHub.
highlight.zh: Twenty 打造現代化的開源 Salesforce 替代方案,並在 GitHub 上公開開發。

summary.en: Shadeform is a GPU cloud marketplace with a unified API to provision GPUs across providers.
summary.zh: Shadeform 是 GPU 雲端市集,提供跨供應商調度 GPU 的統一 API。

highlight.en: Shadeform aggregates GPU availability and pricing across providers, letting teams unlock capacity instantly and run jobs on time at optimal cost.
highlight.zh: Shadeform 彙整跨供應商的 GPU 可用量與價格,讓團隊立即取得算力,並以最佳成本準時執行工作。

summary.en: Sweetspot is an all-in-one, AI-powered platform for government contracting.
summary.zh: Sweetspot 是 AI 驅動的政府標案一體化平台。

highlight.en: Sweetspot helps businesses find, manage, and respond to government opportunities in a single AI-powered government sales platform.
highlight.zh: Sweetspot 在單一 AI 政府銷售平台中,協助企業尋找、管理並回應政府標案機會。

summary.en: Diligent provides AI agents for fintech risk and compliance operations.
summary.zh: Diligent 為金融科技風險與法遵作業提供 AI 代理人。

highlight.en: Diligent uses LLMs to automate customer due diligence, review documents like registry extracts, and remediate false-positive AML alerts.
highlight.zh: Diligent 運用 LLM 自動化客戶盡職調查、審閱登記摘要等文件,並處理 AML 系統的誤判警示。

summary.en: Atla is an improvement engine that helps developers find and fix AI agents' critical failures.
summary.zh: Atla 是協助開發者找出並修復 AI 代理人關鍵故障的改進引擎。

highlight.en: Atla's LLM judge evaluates agents step-by-step to uncover error patterns and suggest fixes, supporting LangChain, CrewAI, and OpenAI Agents.
highlight.zh: Atla 的 LLM 評審逐步評估代理人,找出錯誤模式並提出修正建議,支援 LangChain、CrewAI 與 OpenAI Agents。

summary.en: Airgoods is a wholesale marketplace for the food and beverage industry.
summary.zh: Airgoods 是食品與飲料產業的批發市集。

highlight.en: Airgoods helps independent grocers and specialty stores discover, order, and sell emerging and gourmet food and beverage brands.
highlight.zh: Airgoods 協助獨立雜貨店與特色食品店發掘、訂購並銷售新興與精品食品飲料品牌。

summary.en: Alguna is an AI-native CPQ and billing platform for modern B2B pricing models.
summary.zh: Alguna 是為現代 B2B 計價模式打造的 AI 原生 CPQ 與計費平台。

highlight.en: Alguna connects the full quote-to-cash flow so what sales sells becomes what finance bills automatically, handling usage-based and custom pricing.
highlight.zh: Alguna 串連完整的報價到收款流程,讓業務銷售的內容自動轉為財務帳單,並處理用量計費與客製化定價。

summary.en: Margin is a POS and operating system that helps liquor stores increase profits.
summary.zh: Margin 是協助酒類零售店提高獲利的 POS 與營運系統。

highlight.en: Margin gives beer, wine, and liquor retailers one integrated operating system, bringing enterprise-level technology to an underserved segment.
highlight.zh: Margin 為啤酒、葡萄酒與烈酒零售商提供整合營運系統,將企業級技術帶入長期被忽視的市場。

summary.en: Skyvern is an open-source AI agent that automates browser workflows through an API.
summary.zh: Skyvern 是透過 API 自動化瀏覽器工作流程的開源 AI 代理人。

highlight.en: Skyvern uses LLMs and computer vision to replace brittle scripts, handling tasks like procurement, insurance quotes, and downloading invoices.
highlight.zh: Skyvern 運用 LLM 與電腦視覺取代脆弱腳本,處理如採購、取得保險報價與下載發票等任務。

summary.en: refine is an open-source, headless React framework for rapidly building enterprise web apps.
summary.zh: refine 是用於快速打造企業級 Web 應用的開源無頭式 React 框架。

highlight.en: refine eliminates repetitive tasks like CRUD, auth, and i18n, works with any design via headless UI, and has 15,000+ monthly active developers.
highlight.zh: refine 省去 CRUD、認證與多語系等重複工作,透過無頭式 UI 適配任何設計,每月活躍開發者逾 15,000 名。

summary.en: SafetyKit builds AI agents for risk, compliance, and safety work at big tech and finance companies.
summary.zh: SafetyKit 為大型科技與金融公司打造處理風險、法遵與安全工作的 AI 代理人。

highlight.en: SafetyKit replaces armies of outsourced human reviewers protecting platforms from fraud, harassment, and crime, drawing on Stripe and Airbnb expertise.
highlight.zh: SafetyKit 取代保護平台免於詐欺、騷擾與犯罪的大量外包人工審查員,專業源自 Stripe 與 Airbnb 的經驗。

summary.en: Andromeda Surgical is building autonomous surgical robots to make surgery safer and more efficient.
summary.zh: Andromeda Surgical 正在打造自主手術機器人,讓手術更安全、更有效率。

highlight.en: Andromeda uses AI to make surgery cognitively easier rather than just assisting physically, starting with prostate enucleation.
highlight.zh: Andromeda 運用 AI 讓手術在認知層面更輕鬆,而非僅輔助體力部分,首個適應症為前列腺剜除術。

summary.en: Santé is an all-in-one point-of-sale system for liquor stores.
summary.zh: Santé 是專為酒類零售店打造的一體化 POS 系統。

highlight.en: Santé focuses on the liquor store niche, offering retailers a single all-in-one point-of-sale system for their business.
highlight.zh: Santé 鎖定酒類零售利基市場,為零售商提供單一的一體化 POS 系統。

summary.en: Pure is a transparent marketplace for buying and selling authenticated rare coins and precious metals.
summary.zh: Pure 是買賣經認證稀有錢幣與貴金屬的透明市集。

highlight.en: Pure brings transparency to the $11B rare coins and $55B precious metals sectors, making authenticated gold, silver, and platinum easy to trade.
highlight.zh: Pure 為 110 億美元稀有錢幣與 550 億美元貴金屬市場帶來透明度,讓認證過的黃金、白銀與白金交易更便利。

summary.en: ParadeDB is a Postgres extension offering Elastic-quality search built into the database.
summary.zh: ParadeDB 是內建於資料庫、提供 Elastic 等級搜尋的 Postgres 擴充套件。

highlight.en: ParadeDB is a modern Elastic alternative built as a Postgres extension, giving teams better search without the burden of running Elasticsearch.
highlight.zh: ParadeDB 是以 Postgres 擴充套件打造的現代化 Elastic 替代方案,讓團隊享有更好的搜尋卻無需營運 Elasticsearch。

summary.en: Prosper builds AI phone agents that automate operational workflows for healthcare providers.
summary.zh: Prosper 打造為醫療院所自動化營運流程的 AI 電話代理人。

highlight.en: Prosper's agents automate scheduling, balance reminders, benefit verification, and prior authorizations, integrating with 80+ EHRs and cutting costs 50%.
highlight.zh: Prosper 的代理人自動化排程、餘額提醒、福利核實與事前授權,整合逾 80 套電子病歷並降低 50% 成本。

summary.en: LifestyleRx delivers insurance-covered virtual care for Type 2 diabetes reversal.
summary.zh: LifestyleRx 提供保險給付的虛擬醫療,協助逆轉第二型糖尿病。

highlight.en: LifestyleRx's doctors guide patients through lifestyle changes that reverse the underlying disease process of Type 2 diabetes via virtual care.
highlight.zh: LifestyleRx 的醫師透過虛擬醫療引導病患以生活方式改變來逆轉第二型糖尿病的根本病程。

summary.en: Nowadays is an AI-native platform that plans corporate meetings and events.
summary.zh: Nowadays 是規劃企業會議與活動的 AI 原生平台。

highlight.en: Nowadays' AI emails and calls venues, negotiates rates in 22 languages, parses hotel proposals, and surfaces meeting spend; clients include Google.
highlight.zh: Nowadays 的 AI 會發郵件與致電場地、以 22 種語言協商價格、解析飯店提案並揭露會議支出,客戶包括 Google。

summary.en: Coba offers dual-currency accounts that let LatAm workers earn in USD and spend locally in pesos.
summary.zh: Coba 提供雙幣帳戶,讓拉美工作者以美元賺取收入並以披索在當地消費。

highlight.en: Coba helps Mexican workers at US firms avoid ~$1,000/year in hidden forex and transfer fees, combining US savings with local Mexican services.
highlight.zh: Coba 協助任職美國公司的墨西哥工作者,避免每年約 1,000 美元的隱藏外匯與轉帳費,結合美元儲蓄與墨西哥當地服務。

summary.en: Deasy Labs provides metadata orchestration for generative AI workflows.
summary.zh: Deasy Labs 為生成式 AI 工作流程提供中繼資料協調。

highlight.en: Deasy helps AI teams embed high-quality custom metadata into RAG and agentic workflows, and was acquired by governance leader Collibra in July 2025.
highlight.zh: Deasy 協助 AI 團隊為 RAG 與代理人工作流程嵌入高品質客製中繼資料,並於 2025 年 7 月被治理龍頭 Collibra 收購。

summary.en: Sohar Health is an AI-driven front-end RCM tool that automates insurance verification for providers.
summary.zh: Sohar Health 是以 AI 驅動的前端營收循環工具,為醫療院所自動化保險核實。

highlight.en: Sohar automates 95% of eligibility checks with median 6-second latency and 99% accuracy, boosting patient conversion via an API-first platform.
highlight.zh: Sohar 以 API 優先平台自動化 95% 的資格查核,中位延遲僅 6 秒、準確率達 99%,提升病患轉換率。

summary.en: Serra is a 24/7 AI recruiter that automates candidate sourcing and outreach.
summary.zh: Serra 是全天候運作、自動化人選搜尋與聯繫的 AI 招募員。

highlight.en: Serra finds ideal talent across LinkedIn, GitHub, Crunchbase, and a company's ATS, so hiring teams skip sourcing and just get qualified interviews booked.
highlight.zh: Serra 從 LinkedIn、GitHub、Crunchbase 與企業招募系統找出理想人選,讓招募團隊省去搜尋,直接獲得合格面試。

summary.en: Maven Bio is an AI platform delivering life sciences intelligence for BioPharma teams.
summary.zh: Maven Bio 是為生技製藥團隊提供生命科學情報的 AI 平台。

highlight.en: Maven pairs domain-specific AI with curated industry data across modules for research workflows, indication landscapes, and instant sourced answers.
highlight.zh: Maven 將領域專屬 AI 與精選產業資料結合,模組涵蓋研究工作流程、適應症全景與附來源的即時解答。

summary.en: Silimate is an AI copilot and agent-driven toolset for frontend chip design.
summary.zh: Silimate 是用於前端晶片設計的 AI 副駕駛與代理人驅動工具組。

highlight.en: Silimate helps Fortune 500s and chip unicorns iterate to correct, optimized designs 40x faster, aiming for autonomous spec-to-design for silicon.
highlight.zh: Silimate 協助財星 500 大企業與晶片獨角獸以 40 倍速度迭代出正確且最佳化的設計,目標實現從規格到設計的自主化。

summary.en: Movley acts as an outsourced product quality control department for e-commerce brands.
summary.zh: Movley 為電商品牌擔任外包的產品品質管控部門。

highlight.en: Built by sellers and trusted by 800+ brands, Movley lets Shopify and Amazon sellers start monitoring their product quality in 30 seconds, for free.
highlight.zh: Movley 由賣家打造、獲逾 800 個品牌信賴,讓 Shopify 與 Amazon 賣家在 30 秒內免費開始監控產品品質。

summary.en: Fiber AI provides fresh data APIs for AI sales, recruiting, and growth products.
summary.zh: Fiber AI 為 AI 銷售、招募與成長產品提供即時的資料 API。

highlight.en: Fiber AI offers live data on 40M+ companies, 850M+ people, and 30M+ jobs via APIs, with verified contacts cheaper than Clay, Apollo, and ZoomInfo.
highlight.zh: Fiber AI 透過 API 提供逾 4,000 萬家公司、8.5 億人與 3,000 萬筆職缺的即時資料,聯絡資訊比 Clay、Apollo 與 ZoomInfo 更便宜。

summary.en: Tempo is an AI-powered visual editor for React.
summary.zh: Tempo 是 AI 驅動的 React 視覺化編輯器。

highlight.en: Tempo gives PMs, designers, and engineers a design-tool UX that works like an IDE under the hood, optimized for Vite and Tailwind.
highlight.zh: Tempo 為產品經理、設計師與工程師提供設計工具般的操作體驗,底層卻如同 IDE,並針對 Vite 與 Tailwind 最佳化。

summary.en: Flex is a payment platform that lets businesses accept HSA/FSA payments.
summary.zh: Flex 是讓商家收受 HSA/FSA 付款的支付平台。

highlight.en: Flex acts as Stripe for HSA/FSA payments, aiming to unlock the $150B a year sitting in US health spending accounts for merchants.
highlight.zh: Flex 定位為 HSA/FSA 付款版的 Stripe,目標為商家釋放美國健康帳戶中每年沉睡的 1,500 億美元。

summary.en: Nectar is an AI energy management platform for facility and sustainability teams.
summary.zh: Nectar 是面向設施與永續團隊的 AI 能源管理平台。

highlight.en: Nectar automates utility data analysis using in-house AI agents to optimize energy costs, manage buildings, and report efficiency metrics.
highlight.zh: Nectar 以自家 AI 代理人自動化公用事業資料分析,優化能源成本、管理建築並產出效率指標。

summary.en: Subsets is an AI-driven retention and lifecycle growth platform for subscription media businesses.
summary.zh: Subsets 是面向訂閱媒體業者、以 AI 驅動的留存與生命週期成長平台。

highlight.en: Subsets is an AI decisioning layer that unifies the growth stack to automate lifecycle experimentation; clients include The Atlantic and NBCUniversal.
highlight.zh: Subsets 是統一成長技術堆疊的 AI 決策層,自動化生命週期實驗,客戶包括 The Atlantic 與 NBCUniversal。

summary.en: Spine AI is a visual workspace where one prompt spins up a swarm of AI agents to execute complex tasks.
summary.zh: Spine AI 是一個視覺化工作空間,單一提示即可啟動一群 AI 代理人來執行複雜任務。

highlight.en: Spine breaks work into visible steps on a shared canvas where agents collaborate in parallel and stay inspectable, with humans as the team lead.
highlight.zh: Spine 在共享畫布上將工作拆為可見步驟,代理人平行協作且保持可檢視,使用者則扮演團隊主管角色。

summary.en: Venta AI is a compliant AI sales colleague for outreach in Europe.
summary.zh: Venta AI 是面向歐洲、符合法規的 AI 銷售同事,負責客戶開發。

highlight.en: Venta AI accesses top companies and contact details and carries out automated sales outreach in compliance with EU regulations.
highlight.zh: Venta AI 取得優質公司與聯絡資訊,並在符合歐盟法規的前提下執行自動化銷售開發。

summary.en: Upstream is an inbox designed for both humans and AI agents.
summary.zh: Upstream 是同時為人類與 AI 代理人設計的收件匣。

highlight.en: Upstream's agents sort noise, draft replies in your exact voice, follow up on time, and handle tasks like finding receipts or scheduling meetings.
highlight.zh: Upstream 的代理人會過濾雜訊、以你慣有的語氣草擬回覆、適時跟進,並處理找收據或安排會議等任務。

summary.en: Guac provides AI-powered demand forecasting and replenishment for grocery retailers.
summary.zh: Guac 為雜貨零售商提供 AI 驅動的需求預測與補貨。

highlight.en: Guac accurately forecasts grocery demand so supermarkets order and produce the right amount of inventory, reducing food waste while increasing availability.
highlight.zh: Guac 精準預測雜貨需求,讓超市訂購並生產適量庫存,在提高供應的同時減少食物浪費。

summary.en: MantleBio brings modern data engineering to the lab to help scientists turn data into discoveries.
summary.zh: MantleBio 將現代資料工程引入實驗室,協助科學家將資料轉化為發現。

highlight.en: Mantle applies modern data engineering practices to scientific workflows, helping scientists turn insights into world-changing breakthroughs.
highlight.zh: Mantle 將現代資料工程實務應用於科學工作流程,協助科學家將洞察轉化為改變世界的突破。

summary.en: Mocha lets anyone build and publish web apps in minutes with no coding required.
summary.zh: Mocha 讓任何人都能在數分鐘內建立並發布網頁應用,無需寫程式。

highlight.en: Mocha uses a state-of-the-art coding agent that builds web apps for users, removing the barriers between idea and execution.
highlight.zh: Mocha 運用先進的程式代理人為使用者建構網頁應用,消除構想與執行之間的障礙。

summary.en: Punchcard is an agentive assurance system for auditors, risk consultants, and their clients.
summary.zh: Punchcard 是面向稽核員、風險顧問與其客戶的代理人式查核系統。

highlight.en: Punchcard's assertion-driven AI agents perform testing from natural language instructions, combining planning, document requests, and evidence testing.
highlight.zh: Punchcard 的斷言驅動 AI 代理人依自然語言指令執行測試,整合稽核規劃、文件索取與證據測試。

summary.en: Corgea is an autonomous application security platform that finds and fixes insecure code and packages.
summary.zh: Corgea 是自主找出並修復不安全程式碼與套件的應用程式安全平台。

highlight.en: Corgea validates vulnerabilities and generates safe code fixes in developers' workflow; Zapier sees ~20% more true positives and ~90% fewer false positives.
highlight.zh: Corgea 驗證漏洞並在開發者既有流程中產生安全修補,Zapier 的真陽性提升約 20%、誤報減少約 90%。

summary.en: Cardinal Gray automates auto lenders' lien-filing interactions with the DMV.
summary.zh: Cardinal Gray 自動化汽車放款機構與監理機關的留置權申報互動。

highlight.en: Cardinal Gray uses LLMs to automate state- and county-varying DMV lien filings for car loans, having handled filings for over $1B of loans.
highlight.zh: Cardinal Gray 運用 LLM 自動化各州與各郡規則不一的汽車貸款 DMV 留置權申報,已處理逾 10 億美元貸款的申報。

summary.en: Unhaze is a revenue optimization tool that surfaces the right leads at the right time for B2B sales.
summary.zh: Unhaze 是營收最佳化工具,為 B2B 銷售在對的時機找出對的潛在客戶。

highlight.en: Unhaze analyzes past deals and continuously monitors company data to find the leads sales teams are most likely to close now, aiming to double win rates.
highlight.zh: Unhaze 分析過往成交並持續監控公司資料,找出銷售團隊當下最可能成交的名單,目標讓成交率翻倍。

summary.en: Surface Labs is an AI-powered marketing ops platform that turns website visitors into qualified leads.
summary.zh: Surface Labs 是 AI 驅動的行銷營運平台,將網站訪客轉化為合格名單。

highlight.en: Surface replaces HubSpot Forms, Zapier, and Chili Piper with one platform whose AI agents handle capture, enrichment, routing, and follow-up.
highlight.zh: Surface 以單一平台取代 HubSpot Forms、Zapier 與 Chili Piper,其 AI 代理人處理擷取、補強、分流與跟進。
